name: Stalker's ring
hoverSummary: Bow-focused ring with Shadow's Mercy for extra critical strike chance.
detailLines: Examine: A fabled ring that burns with primeval venom. It can improve the wearer's skill with a bow.
Grants +3% critical strike chance when wielding a bow.
With Enchantment of shadows, improves this to +4% critical strike chance and adds +3% critical strike damage when using a bow.
Strong future candidate for ranged crit modeling.
